phases.name: Foundation wiring
phases.focus: Connect handlers to Postgres, real CRUD, SDK methods

tasks.name: Migration runner
tasks.notes: cmd/migrate/main.go is a stub; migrations run manually via psql

phases.name: Marketplace Registry & Fee Foundation
phases.notes: Branch feat/marketplace-registry merged to master. Three-layer plugin architecture: marketplace_definitions → fee_schedules → tenant accounts/policies. Fee lookup fallback chain: CommissionOverride → fee_schedules (4-level priority) → policy.CommissionPercent. Seed adapters for ML, Shopee, Magalu. Chrome validation passed.

tasks.name: Registry + fee schedule backend
tasks.notes: Migrations 0010-0013, registry package, FeeScheduleService, FeeSyncService, connector seed adapters, transport handlers, FeeScheduleLookup in BatchOrchestrator

tasks.name: Audit remediation
tasks.notes: 7 issues resolved: LookupFee single-query rewrite, CategoryID wiring, fromDomain mapping, commission_override transport, OpenAPI admin endpoints + schema, SDK types, 15 new tests

tasks.name: Chrome validation
tasks.notes: All 6 pages pass, zero console errors, batch simulation running correctly at 19.9% avg margin

phases.name: UI/UX Overhaul & Marketplace Data Foundation
phases.focus: Fix marketplace page UX to match legacy quality; seed all 6 marketplace definitions with full commission profiles and capabilities

tasks.name: Redesign Marketplace page UI/UX
subtasks: Study legacy page: MarketplaceCard grid, 4-tab panel (Config/Connection/Matrix/Frete), commission matrix, escopo comercial strip
Redesign current MPC marketplace page to match legacy quality and navigation model
Add capabilities display, completeness score, average margin per marketplace

tasks.name: Seed all 6 marketplace definitions into MPC
tasks.notes: Legacy has: ML (oauth2, 14.8%+R$5), Amazon (lwa, 12%), Magalu (oauth2, 16%), Leroy (api_key, 18%), Madeira (token, 15%), Shopee (blocked, tiered). Only ML/Shopee/Magalu are in MPC definitions today.
subtasks: Add Amazon Brasil, Leroy Merlin, Madeira Madeira to marketplace_definitions registry adapters
Add capabilities and auth_strategy fields to marketplace_definitions schema
Seed commission profiles for all 6 channels into fee_schedules at startup
Use /brainstorming to map legacy per-category commission rules into MPC fee_schedules format

tasks.name: Close Phase 3 open items
subtasks: Add commission_override field to Add Policy form UI (backend already accepts it)
Wire ListingType through BatchPolicy so ML classico/premium per-listing rates reach orchestrator
Implement real migration runner in cmd/migrate/main.go (currently a stub)
